summary: Classified the mixed PR-inventory shard without GitHub mutations. The job explicitly says this is not a dedupe cluster, so no shared canonical was selected. Instant close, low-signal close, merge, fix, and raise-PR paths are disabled by the job/fix artifact; open PRs are retained or escalated only where hydrated evidence shows maintainer signal, unresolved review feedback, missing check hydration, or technical correctness judgment.

actions.reason: Security-sensitive linked ref must be routed to central OpenClaw security handling only.
No shared canonical exists for this inventory shard and the PR needs proof/maintainer review before any mutation.
Maintainer-owned session-state recovery work with incomplete check hydration requires maintainer judgment; no mutation is safe from this shard.
Keep open as a viable related candidate; no shared canonical or mutation path is authorized.
Broad feature surface plus unresolved review/check interpretation requires maintainer technical correctness judgment.
Maintainer-authored PR with unresolved review findings must remain with maintainers; no automated mutation is authorized.
Keep open for maintainer review; it is a plausible focused candidate but this shard cannot merge or close linked issue #80536.
Draft maintainer work needs maintainer disposition; no mutation is authorized.
The open human technical concern and failing proof require maintainer technical correctness judgment.
Keep open as related work, but proof failure blocks any stronger fixed-by-candidate or closeout classification.
Maintainer draft with required changes must stay with maintainers; no mutation is authorized.
Retain as related open work; no action beyond classification is safe in this shard.
Keep open and related to #89688; proof failure blocks fixed-by-candidate closure.
Keep issue open and related to #91134 until a fix lands.
Conflicting proof signals and broad Telegram behavior changes require maintainer judgment.
Maintainer draft requires maintainer disposition.
Maintainer draft and overlapping technical scope require maintainer judgment.
Keep issue open and related to #92526; no closure is authorized before merge.
Keep issue open and related to #92003 until maintainer review and check hydration are complete.
Related overlapping candidate should stay open for maintainer comparison; no closeout is authorized.
